conflict: Territorial irritation compounded by poverty and a failed bounty — the crew is broke, hungry, and someone has taken the one reliable thing Jet has
consequence: Routine return becomes territorial dispute with a hidden edge; the crew unites around petty grievance unaware the ship is bait; Ed detects something anomalous in the ship's signal
must_land_beats: The Bebop arrives at Mama Yun's to find their spot taken by an unfamiliar ship
Establish crew dynamic through argument about whose fault the failed Deimos bounty was
Mama Yun reveals the ship has been there three days, pilot pre-paid six months docking — enraging Jet
Ed's focused expression at the end when the ship's ID returns anomalous results
The crew docks two blocks away at a paid spot, burning their last woolongs
pressure_source: Territorial irritation compounded by poverty and a failed bounty — the crew is broke, hungry, and someone has taken the one reliable thing Jet has
state_shift: Routine return becomes territorial dispute with a hidden edge; the crew unites around petty grievance unaware the ship is bait; Ed detects something anomalous in the ship's signal
